Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You're the one who keeps coming back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}What's your name? You from around here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Oh, not even listening, huh... Haha, figures...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}What's wrong with you!? Can't you mind your own business!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Are you kidding? I can't just ignore that![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Gimme your hand! I can wrap it up with this handkerchief.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Huh? Who wouldn't be freakin' out right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 5 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You gotta get to a doctor! Uh, do you want me to go with you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}My name. You asked, didn't you, Junpei?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I doubt you'll be able to understand it... But if you want to see it so badly, then you know where to find me.[n]{f 1 1}
